title: fuirena squarrosa var. hispida
intro: Fuirena squarrosa var. hispida, also known as hispid Fuirena, is a variety of the Fuirena squarrosa plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Fuirena squarrosa var. hispida include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and decoctions, which are said to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
